brightsmith_specReference.amendmentNotes: Per spec §8 amendment, this lineage file uses the spec basename (`full-pipeline-eada-*`) rather than a table basename. This event covers ONLY the bronze zone (`bronze.eada`) for now; silver (`base.eada`) and consumable (`consumable.institution_aura`) lineage events are future appends. The multi-zone consumable lineage event will list both `base.ipeds_finance` and `base.eada` as inputs per §8 line 747.

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Bronze-zone landing of the EADA Athletics Disclosure Survey institution-totals file (InstLevel.xlsx, 2022-2023 academic cycle) into Iceberg table bronze.eada. The EadaIngestor reads the EDA-pre-converted CSV cache at data/raw/eada_cache/eada_2022.csv (2,040 rows × 168 columns), filters to institution-total rows (no-op for InstLevel.xlsx — already one-row-per-UNITID by construction; INSTITUTION_TOTAL_FILTER_COLUMN=None short-circuits to True), applies suppression-sentinel scrubbing ('', '-1', '-2' -> NULL) BEFORE numeric coercion across all three monetary fields, coerces UNITID to Iceberg long (handles int / float / quoted-string / leading-zero variants; rows with unparseable UNITID dropped with WARNING), coerces the three monetary fields (GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE, GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE, RECRUITEXP_TOTAL) to Iceberg double, stamps reporting_year=2022 from DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR (academic-year-start convention; EADA file has no in-row year column), and lets BaseIngestor.ingest() append the framework metadata fields (source_url, source_method, ingested_at, load_date). source_method is fixed up post-hoc to reflect the actual fetch path ('csv_cache' for the cache-first default, 'bulk_csv_download' when bulk_url is supplied). All 12 P0/P1 DQ rules from raw-eada-20260501T040238Z.json passed (10 P0 + 2 P1, zero violations).
brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoningContinued: EDA pin (governance/eda/full-pipeline-eada-raw-eda.md, 2026-04-30) overrode the spec's working-assumption column names — actual InstLevel.xlsx columns are GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE / GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE / RECRUITEXP_TOTAL (NOT *_TOTAL_TOTAL variants) and identity columns are lowercase unitid / institution_name (NOT UNITID / INSTNM). These pins are encoded as class constants on EadaIngestor and overridable via __init__ kwargs without code changes. No transformation of values beyond null-sentinel scrubbing and type coercion — bronze is a faithful capture of the EADA payload.

documentation.description: Land the EADA Athletics Disclosure Survey institution-totals file (InstLevel.xlsx) into Iceberg table bronze.eada. Single entity, one row per UNITID per academic reporting year. Cache-first reads from data/raw/eada_cache/eada_<year>.csv with the live SPA backend at https://ope.ed.gov/athletics/api/dataFiles/file?fileName=EADA_<YYYY-YYYY>.zip as the refresh path. Filters to institution-total rows (no-op for InstLevel.xlsx by construction), scrubs EADA suppression sentinels ('', '-1', '-2') to NULL before numeric coercion, coerces UNITID to Iceberg long with explicit handling of int/float/quoted-string/leading-zero variants, coerces monetary fields to Iceberg double, and stamps reporting_year=2022 from DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR (academic-year-start convention; EADA has no in-row year column). Framework metadata (source_url, source_method, ingested_at, load_date) is appended by BaseIngestor.ingest() post-flatten. source_method is corrected post-hoc to the actual fetch path.

dataSource.name: EADA 2022-2023 InstLevel.xlsx (CSV cache)
dataSource.provider: U.S. Department of Education, Office of Postsecondary Education

fields.name: unitid
fields.description: EADA identity column — lowercase in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'UNITID'). EDA-pinned 2026-04-30. May arrive as int, float, quoted string, or leading-zero string.

fields.name: institution_name
fields.description: EADA identity column — lowercase in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'INSTNM'). EDA-pinned 2026-04-30.

fields.name: GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE
fields.description: Total athletic expenses for the institution. EDA-pinned 2026-04-30 — actual column name in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'EXP_TOTAL_TOTAL'). May contain EADA suppression sentinels ('', '-1', '-2').

fields.name: GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE
fields.description: Total athletic revenue for the institution. EDA-pinned 2026-04-30 — actual column name in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'REV_TOTAL_TOTAL'). May contain EADA suppression sentinels.

fields.name: RECRUITEXP_TOTAL
fields.description: Recruiting expenses for the institution. EDA-pinned 2026-04-30 — actual column name in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'RECRUITEXP_TOTAL_TOTAL'). May contain EADA suppression sentinels.

schema.note: InstLevel.xlsx has 168 columns total; only the 5 fields listed above are read by EadaIngestor. The remaining 163 columns (per-sport breakdowns, demographic splits) are intentionally not ingested at bronze.

inputFacets.fileSourceFormat: Excel (InstLevel.xlsx) pre-converted to CSV during EDA

fields.name: unitid
fields.description: IPEDS institution ID. Iceberg field id 1, grain field. Coerced from any of int/float/quoted-string/leading-zero variants in the source CSV.

fields.name: reporting_year
fields.description: EADA reporting cycle (academic-year-start convention; 2022 = the 2022-2023 cycle). Iceberg field id 3. Pinned per ingest from DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR; the EADA file has no in-row year column.

fields.name: total_athletic_expenses
fields.description: GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE coerced to double after suppression-sentinel scrub. Iceberg field id 4.

fields.name: total_athletic_revenue
fields.description: GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE coerced to double after suppression-sentinel scrub. Iceberg field id 5.

fields.name: recruiting_expenses
fields.description: RECRUITEXP_TOTAL coerced to double after suppression-sentinel scrub. Iceberg field id 6.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: EADA landing page URL stamped on every row by EadaIngestor.get_source_url() — points at https://ope.ed.gov/athletics/ rather than a transient bulk URL so audit trails remain stable across runs. Iceberg field id 7.

fields.name: source_method
fields.description: Fetch-path provenance: 'csv_cache' (default cache-first path) or 'bulk_csv_download' (when bulk_url kwarg supplied). Set post-hoc by EadaIngestor.ingest() to reflect the actual fetch path. Iceberg field id 8.

fields.name: ingested_at
fields.description: Bronze write timestamp stamped by BaseIngestor.ingest(). Iceberg field id 9.

fields.name: load_date
fields.description: Date of bronze load stamped by BaseIngestor.ingest(). Iceberg field id 10.

unitid.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_long(row['unitid']): coerces the lowercase 'unitid' EADA column to int (Iceberg long). Handles all observed source variants — int, float (truncated), quoted string (strips single/double quotes), and leading-zero string. Returns None on failure; rows with None UNITID are dropped with a WARNING log line (none observed in the 2022 run). NaN floats are also rejected. bool values are explicitly excluded (bool is a subclass of int in Python).

institution_name.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_string(row['institution_name']): str() then .strip(). Empty strings collapse to None, but the bronze schema marks institution_name required=true — DQ rule RAW-EAD-002 (P0) enforces 100% non-null on the grain.

reporting_year.transformationDescription: Stamped from EadaIngestor.reporting_year (defaults to DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR=2022) on every row. The EADA file does not carry an in-row year column — reporting_year is encoded only in the cache filename (eada_<year>.csv). Academic-year-start convention: 2022 = the 2022-2023 cycle. DQ rule RAW-EAD-010 (P0) verifies single-value invariant across all 2,040 rows.

total_athletic_expenses.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_double(_strip_sentinel(row['GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE'])): two-stage transform. (1) _strip_sentinel maps EADA suppression sentinels ('', '-1', '-2' as stripped strings) to None — applied BEFORE coercion so the sentinel '-1' does not survive as numeric -1 and trigger RAW-EAD-004. (2) _coerce_double strips currency formatting (',' and '$'), parses to float, rejects NaN. Zero sentinel hits observed in 2022 (per EDA).

total_athletic_revenue.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_double(_strip_sentinel(row['GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE'])): same two-stage sentinel-then-coerce pattern as total_athletic_expenses. Zero sentinel hits observed in 2022.

recruiting_expenses.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_double(_strip_sentinel(row['RECRUITEXP_TOTAL'])): same two-stage sentinel-then-coerce pattern as the other monetary fields. Zero sentinel hits observed in 2022.

source_url.transformationDescription: Stamped from EadaIngestor.get_source_url() = BULK_URL_TEMPLATE = 'https://ope.ed.gov/athletics/' on every row. Deliberately points at the human-facing landing page rather than the SPA-backend bulk download URL so audit trails remain stable across runs (the SPA fileName parameter changes per cycle).

source_method.transformationDescription: Set post-hoc by EadaIngestor.ingest() override to the actual fetch path: 'csv_cache' (cache-first default; what this 2026-04-30 run used) or 'bulk_csv_download' (when bulk_url kwarg supplied). The framework's default behavior of stamping the method string passed to ingest() is overridden because the actual path is determined inside fetch().

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Framework-injected by BaseIngestor.ingest() — UTC timestamp at bronze write time.

load_date.transformationDescription: Framework-injected by BaseIngestor.ingest() — date component of the bronze write timestamp.

assertions.name: reporting_year is single value across all rows
Spot check: at least one row total_athletic_expenses > $100M (D1 anchor)
Row count within 1% of distinct UNITIDs (filter regression tripwire)
